name: Legacy mount* subsystems (now per-spec files at data/legacy/)

facets.name: comment
facets.data: Per the no-monolith rule (CLAUDE.md refusals), each legacy-system spec moved to its own file at data/legacy/<slug>.json. The world references them directly via {ref}. This file remains as a documentation breadcrumb for anyone grepping for `legacy_systems`; the audit tool and test runner now scan data/legacy/*.json directly. To add a new hosted legacy mount: drop a new <name>.json under data/legacy/, then add `{ref: "legacy/<name>"}` to data/worlds/default.json children.
